instruction.purpose: - To plan implementation of the idea discussed. - To focus entirely on conceptual vision.
instruction.instruction: - Create concrete plan required for implementation, describing a way to get there in the most elegant, simple, idiomatic and correct way possible. - Plan according to the files, list files that will be changed, for each provide description of changes required - Do not use technical jargon too much
instruction.important_constraints: - Omit all introductory preambles, summaries, and compliments. You must get straight to the point. - DO NOT write any code blocks yet. We are in plan phase.
